nasb.text: Their bulbs and their branches shall be of one piece with it; all of it shall be one piece of hammered work of pure gold.

esv.text: Their calyxes and their branches shall be of one piece with it, the whole of it a single piece of hammered work of pure gold.

cnv.text: 球和枝子都要與燈臺連在一起，都是從一塊純金錘成的。

ccb.text: 整座灯台，包括一切装饰，都要用一块纯金打造。
